heading: Guidance on electromagnetic spectrum operations mission area and joint electromagnetic spectrum operations
label: 500a Guidance on electromagnetic spectrum operations mission area and joint electromagnetic spectrum operations
notes: Amendments2024— renumbered , relating to guidance on electromagnetic spectrum operations mission area and joint electromagnetic spectrum operations, as this section.Pub. L. 118–159section 501 of this title
amendments: Amendments2024— renumbered , relating to guidance on electromagnetic spectrum operations mission area and joint electromagnetic spectrum operations, as this section.Pub. L. 118–159section 501 of this title

children.text: establish processes and procedures to develop, integrate, and enhance the electromagnetic spectrum operations mission area and the conduct of joint electromagnetic spectrum operations in all domains across the Department of Defense; and

ensure that such processes and procedures provide for integrated defense-wide strategy, planning, and budgeting with respect to the conduct of such operations by the Department, including activities conducted to counter and deter such operations by malign actors.
